title: crepidiastrum denticulatum subsp. denticulatum
intro: Crepidiastrum denticulatum subsp. denticulatum, also known as the Chinese plantain, is a type of flowering plant in the aster family. It has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating digestive issues, fever, and skin problems, due to its antipyretic, anti-inflammatory, and antibacterial properties. The plant is rich in flavonoids, terpenoids, and saponins, which contribute to its health benefits, including reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and boosting the immune system. The herbal preparations of Crepidiastrum denticulatum subsp. denticulatum include decoctions, infusions, and capsules, which can be used to treat various health conditions and promote overall well-being.
